summary: UI layout refinement project with collapsible comment history and repositioned controls

existing_features.title: Add a 'History' link with an icon positioned opposite the existing 'Comments' label in the ActivitySection component
Make the comment history section in ActivitySection visible only when the history link is clicked, implementing a toggle state
Move the submit and cancel button section in the phone screen to appear below the document section in the case detail layout

new_feature_requests.summary: Add history link opposite 'comments' to toggle comment history visibility
Move submit and cancel section below document section within phone screen

projectName: Add collapsible comment history with toggle link and reposition submit/cancel buttons
